findings.title: Direct URL fetch from user input
findings.description: User-supplied URL passed directly to do_http_get via cpp-httplib without any validation

findings.title: Incomplete blocklist bypass in URL preview
findings.description: Preview handler blocks only localhost and 127.0.0.1 but allows other loopback representations, private ranges, and metadata IPs

findings.title: Webhook callback without re-validation
findings.description: Webhook test handler fetches stored callback URL without re-validating the destination, enabling two-step SSRF

findings.title: Metadata endpoint check bypassable via DNS rebinding
findings.description: Import handler checks hostname string for 169.254 prefix but is bypassable via DNS rebinding or alternative hostnames

findings.title: Service proxy with arbitrary base_url fallback
findings.description: Proxy handler falls back to user-supplied base_url when service name is unrecognized, enabling arbitrary SSRF
